calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Transferring Property To Trust
Off Calendar May-20-2011 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Val Sluetzky for Paul Calcagno.

Mr. Sluetzky explained the circumstances giving rise to signing of the various estate planning documents as well as who the Parties were that participated in/assisted with execution of the documents, stated that Ms. Calcagno was competent and that none of the Beneficiaries were challenging the validity of the document. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Brown.
